name: io.github.codespar/mcp-sift
description: MCP server for Sift — global enterprise ML-based fraud detection, real-time risk scoring (payment/account/content abuse), decisions workflows, and event ingestion

environmentVariables.name: SIFT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Sift API key. Used in the Events API request body ($api_key) and as the HTTP Basic auth username (empty password) for Score + Decisions APIs.

environmentVariables.name: SIFT_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Sift Account ID. Required for all Decisions API v3 endpoints (path segment /v3/accounts/{account_id}/...).

environmentVariables.name: SIFT_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Sift API base URL. Defaults to https://api.sift.com.
